description: As a logistics analyst needing a cross-tabulation of sales performance, create a Pivot Table visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset (C:\workspace\data\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx). The Pivot Table must display Revenue by Product Category in the rows and Customer Segment in the columns. Title the visualization 'Revenue by Category and Segment' and save the workbook as 'Logistics_Revenue_Pivot' in the Documents folder.
